description_long: A wooden serving board displays an assortment of sushi, including several pieces of salmon nigiri, maki rolls with seaweed wrapping, and slices of sashimi. The sushi is arranged neatly, with a small mound of green wasabi and a portion of pink pickled ginger placed near the center. Two black chopsticks rest diagonally across the board, adding to the authentic presentation. There are also two rectangular dishes, one of which appears to contain soy sauce. The sushi pieces feature vibrant colors, with orange salmon, white rice, and dark seaweed, creating a visually appealing spread. The overall presentation suggests a fresh, high-quality sushi platter suitable for serving in a restaurant or at an outdoor urban event.
description: A wooden board holds a colorful assortment of sushi, sashimi, wasabi, ginger, and chopsticks, arranged with two small dishes for condiments.
description_view_0: Front view shows salmon nigiri, maki rolls, sashimi, wasabi, ginger, and chopsticks on a wooden board.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the round maki rolls and the arrangement of nigiri, with condiments and chopsticks visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the maki rolls and nigiri, with chopsticks and condiment dishes in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the full spread of sushi types, with all pieces and condiments visible from above.
